visa_free.name: French Southern Hemisphere and Antarctic Lands

e_visa.name: Bahrain
e_visa.notes: E-visa required prior to visit; obtainable online before travel

eta.name: Canada
eta.notes: Electronic Travel Authorization (eTA) required prior to check-in at airport

outbound_official.notes: The official HKSAR Immigration Department page lists 174 countries and territories under a combined 'Visa-free access or visa-on-arrival' heading without strict separation between the two categories. The page notes that some destinations (Canada, Israel, Kenya) require prior electronic authorisation (ETA/eTA/ETA-IL) before travel, and Bahrain requires an e-visa obtained online in advance. Indonesia requires a digital 'All Indonesia' declaration. South Korea's K-ETA is temporarily suspended for HKSAR passport holders through 31 December 2026. Duration of stays range from 14 to 180 days depending on destination. Entries here reflect the outbound list as published on the official HKSAR Immigration Department travel document page.

visa_free.notes: British citizens may stay visa-free for 180 days.

visa_free.nationality: Britain (British Overseas Territories citizens, British Overseas citizens, British subjects and British Protected persons)

visa_free.notes: Excludes Costa Rican Provisional passports and Documento de Identidad Y Viaje, which require a visa.
Excludes Special Peruvian passports, which require a visa.

visa_free.nationality: Serbia (Republic of) (holders of Serbian biometric passports only)
visa_free.notes: Biometric passport holders only; non-biometric Serbian passports require a visa.

visa_free.nationality: St. Helena Dependencies (Ascension, Tristan da Cunha)
The South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands
The Sovereign Base Areas of Akrotiri and Dhekelia

visa_free.notes: Excludes Tongan National passports and Tongan Protected Persons passports, which require a visa.
Tuvalu travel documents with national status stated as 'I-TUVALU' require a visa.
Uruguay passports issued under Decree 289/90 require a visa.
U.S.A. Diplomatic passport holders require a visa.

visa_free.nationality: US Trust Territory of Pacific Islands (holders of US Trust Territory passports only)

visa_free.notes: Vatican Service passports require a visa.

eta.notes: Pre-Arrival Registration (PAR) required; valid 6 months, multiple visits, 14 days each.

visa_policy.notes: Visa-free stay length varies by nationality (90/30/14/7 days). British citizens get 180 days. Nationals of foreign countries not otherwise listed (and not in the visa-required list) may visit visa-free for 7 days. India requires online Pre-Arrival Registration (PAR) before visa-free entry (see eta). Source: IMMD table updated November 2025.

conditional_access.conditions: Holders of Diplomatic and Official passports of Angola may visit the HKSAR visa-free for a stay not exceeding 14 days. All other nationals (ordinary passport holders) are required to hold a valid visa for the HKSAR for whatever purpose, including those in transit remaining on the airside.

Holders of Diplomatic and Official passports of Azerbaijan may visit the HKSAR visa-free for a stay not exceeding 14 days. Ordinary passport holders require a visa. Note: the IMMD page uses footnote # which may also permit ordinary passport holders some form of access — but the live table shows ordinary passport holders require a visa for Azerbaijan.

Holders of Diplomatic and Official passports of Bangladesh may visit the HKSAR visa-free for a stay not exceeding 14 days. Ordinary passport holders are required to hold a valid visa for the HKSAR for whatever purpose (including those who are in transit and remain on the airside).

Holders of Diplomatic and Official passports of Burundi may visit the HKSAR visa-free for a stay not exceeding 14 days. Ordinary passport holders are required to hold a valid visa for the HKSAR for whatever purpose, including those in transit remaining on the airside.

Note: from October 2024 IMMD extended multiple-entry visa validity to 3 years for ordinary Laos nationals, but ordinary passport holders still require a visa.

Note: from October 2024 IMMD extended multiple-entry visa validity to 3 years for ordinary Myanmar nationals, but ordinary passport holders still require a visa.

Holders of Diplomatic and Official passports of Nepal may visit the HKSAR visa-free for a stay not exceeding 14 days. Ordinary passport holders are required to hold a valid visa for the HKSAR for whatever purpose (including those who are in transit and remain on the airside).

Holders of Diplomatic and Official passports of Pakistan may visit the HKSAR visa-free for a stay not exceeding 30 days. Ordinary passport holders are required to hold a valid visa for the HKSAR for whatever purpose (including those who are in transit and remain on the airside).

Holders of Diplomatic and Official passports of Togo may visit the HKSAR visa-free for a stay not exceeding 14 days. Ordinary passport holders are required to hold a valid visa for the HKSAR for whatever purpose (including those who are in transit and remain on the airside).

Holders of Diplomatic and Official passports of Uzbekistan may visit the HKSAR visa-free for a stay not exceeding 14 days. Ordinary passport holders are required to hold a valid visa for the HKSAR for whatever purpose (including those who are in transit and remain on the airside).

Holders of Diplomatic and Official passports of Vietnam may visit the HKSAR visa-free for a stay not exceeding 14 days. Ordinary passport holders are required to hold a valid visa. Note: from October 2024 IMMD extended multiple-entry visa validity to 3 years for ordinary Vietnamese nationals, but ordinary passport holders still require a visa.

validation_notes: CORRECTION (2026-06-14): India (IND) reclassified from visa_free/visa_policy to eta. Ordinary Indian passport holders require mandatory free Pre-arrival Registration (PAR) online before travel (immd.gov.hk, IMMD official — verified June 2026). India removed from visa_policy array; conditional_access level updated to 'eta'. Airline aggregator claim of 'visa-free or visa-on-arrival' is incorrect — PAR is a mandatory pre-travel online registration prerequisite.

MAJOR ADDITION: Added complete visa_policy array covering all ~160+ ordinary-passport visa-free nationalities from the IMMD official table (updated November 2025). The prior record had no visa_policy entries at all.

ADDITION: Added India to conditional_access with basis='pre_registration' (14 days, ordinary passport, PAR required). India appears in the IMMD table with a '%' footnote indicating mandatory pre-arrival registration online.
ADDITION: Added Angola (^) to conditional_access — diplomatic/official 14 days; ordinary = visa required. Was missing from prior record.
ADDITION: Added Azerbaijan (#) to conditional_access — diplomatic/official 14 days; ordinary = visa required (footnote # confirmed ordinary passport requires visa). Was missing from prior record.
ADDITION: Added Burundi (^) to conditional_access — diplomatic/official 14 days; ordinary = visa required. Was missing from prior record.
ADDITION: Added Cambodia (#) to conditional_access — diplomatic/official 14 days; ordinary = visa required. Was missing from prior record.
ADDITION: Added Cameroon (^) to conditional_access — diplomatic/official 14 days; ordinary = visa required. Was missing from prior record.

ADDITION: Added Congo (Republic of) (^) to conditional_access — diplomatic/official 14 days; ordinary = visa required. The prior data_quality gap about Congo (Republic) is now resolved: the live IMMD table shows ^ footnote (diplomatic/official 14 days, ordinary = visa required).
ADDITION: Added Ethiopia (^) to conditional_access — diplomatic/official 14 days; ordinary = visa required. Was missing from prior record.
ADDITION: Added Vietnam (#) to conditional_access — diplomatic/official 14 days; ordinary = visa required. Was missing from prior record.

CONFIRMED: Bangladesh, Ghana, Sri Lanka, Togo (^ footnote), Pakistan (※ footnote), Kyrgyzstan, Laos, Moldova, Myanmar, Nepal, Tajikistan, Turkmenistan, Uzbekistan (# footnote) were all correctly classified in the prior record.
CONFIRMED: Eswatini (formerly Swaziland) uses footnote * (all nationals require visa including transit airside) — added to visa_policy notes section.
DATA SOURCE: The IMMD visit-visa-entry-permit page was confirmed as updated November 2025. Firecrawl fetch date was June 12, 2026.

REBUILD (2026-06-14): visa_policy fully reconstructed from the official IMMD visit-visa-entry-permit table (updated November 2025) via firecrawl_scrape. Every row with a positive visa-free period was captured into visa_policy.visa_free with its correct band (14/30/90 days; British citizens 180 days). India kept in eta (PAR). The catch-all '7 days for nationals of other foreign countries' row is noted in visa_policy.notes rather than as a named nationality. visa_policy is an object with keyed fields (not an array).

NOTE ON FOOTNOTE #: For countries with footnote # (Azerbaijan, Cambodia, Kyrgyzstan, Laos, Moldova, Myanmar, Nepal, Tajikistan, Turkmenistan, Uzbekistan, Vietnam), the IMMD remarks state only 'Holders of Diplomatic and Official passports may visit the HKSAR visa-free for a stay not exceeding 14 days' — this means ordinary passport holders DO require a visa (confirmed by 'Visa Required#' shown in the table's third column).

cbi, rbi, fast_track: Hong Kong does not operate a citizenship-by-investment or formal residency-by-investment programme in the standard CBI/RBI sense. The Quality Migrant Admission Scheme (QMAS) and other talent schemes exist but are not CBI/RBI. Set to null as not confirmable from official sources.
gaps: The exact bilateral treaty names, dates, and signatories for the diplomatic/official passport waivers (Bangladesh, Ghana, Sri Lanka, Togo, Pakistan, Kyrgyzstan, Laos, Moldova, Myanmar, Nepal, Tajikistan, Turkmenistan, Uzbekistan, Angola, Burundi, Cameroon, Congo (Republic), Ethiopia, Azerbaijan, Cambodia, Vietnam) are not published on the IMMD visit-visa-entry-permit page.

No credential-based conditional entry rule (e.g., held third-country visa/residence permit) was found on any official IMMD/gov.hk source. Hong Kong immigration does not appear to grant facilitated entry solely because a traveller holds a valid US, Schengen, UK, Canadian, Australian, Japanese, or other foreign visa or residence permit.

No OCI (Overseas Citizen of India) cardholder conditional entry rule found for Hong Kong. The Hong Kong PAR page exempts diplomatic/official Indian passport holders, UN Laissez-Passer holders, HKSAR Travel Pass holders, and e-Channel frequent visitors — OCI is not listed as a separate exempt category.

Eswatini (formerly Swaziland): classified under * footnote (all nationals including diplomats require visa). Could not confirm whether Eswatini has a separate diplomatic passport agreement on the live page — the table shows 'Visa Required*' with no ^ or # qualifier.
Algeria was newly confirmed at 14 days (as of November 2025 table). A 2025 press release from IMMD mentioned Algeria gained visa-free access — the live table now reflects this.
Belarus 30-day ordinary passport access was confirmed from the live table.
